strengths: Experience with BI tools (Tableau, Looker, Power BI)
Effective stakeholder communication and data storytelling
weaknesses: No explicit Metabase or Looker Studio mention
No prior single-owner data-hire role stated
No explicit account health or churn modeling example
improvement_bullets: Developed behavioral health scoring models to evaluate account risk, identifying churn-prone clients and enabling targeted intervention by Customer Success teams.
Built and maintained product analytics funnels using event-level data to track user engagement and identify friction points in the commercial conversion journey.
Designed automated retention analysis reports to segment users by tenure and feature utilization, providing clear, actionable guidance for product prioritization.
Architected end-to-end data pipelines in a B2B SaaS context, integrating CRM and usage data to build a single source of truth for commercial funnel performance.
Leveraged AI-assisted coding workflows and automated validation to maintain CRM data integrity and enrich account intelligence for enterprise-level sales operations.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst opportunity with Mentor Talent Acquisition. I am interested in this opportunity because of your focus on developing AI-driven solutions for private markets; your position as a self-funded, profitable leader in the space is incredibly impressive. What interests me about working for Mentor Talent Acquisition is its approach to scaling high-impact analytical infrastructure from the ground up, which intrigues me because I thrive on taking ownership of foundational projects and shaping strategic decision-making. I believe my expertise in building automated data pipelines and my experience in cross-functional stakeholder communication would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex technical datasets into actionable business growth strategies. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified high-value customer segments using statistical modeling and automated reporting, which directly contributed to a 300% increase in revenue for those segments over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at Mentor Talent Acquisition would allow me to bring my data modeling skills to your product usage and engagement efforts. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst enabled me to develop my CRM and funnel analysis skills. I engineered automated workflows to sync CRM and POS data, which eliminated 8 hours of manual work per week and significantly improved reporting accuracy. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in product analytics in working on account health modeling at Mentor Talent Acquisition. I know that my technical proficiency in SQL and Python and my commitment to data integrity align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
